explicit_caveats: The retune only uses committed live portfolio modes as sleeves.
The dynamic allocator path is still research/backtest; the deployable mode uses the validation-primary static allocation.
OOS is report-only and was not used for tuning or health priors.
Paper/canary execution is still required before capital promotion.

live_implementable_ranked_candidates.caveat: committed live mode using the validation-primary static allocation over live portfolio sleeves

live_implementable_ranked_candidates.caveat: dynamic allocation path; live mode below uses the saved final allocation
